scripts.check: bun run check:root && bun run --cwd packages/shared check && bun run --cwd apps/api-worker check && bun run --cwd apps/web check && bun run --cwd docs-site check
scripts.typecheck: bun run version:write && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/api-worker typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd docs-site typecheck
scripts.test: bun run version:write && bun run --cwd apps/api-worker test && bun run --cwd apps/web test
scripts.build: bun run version:write && bun run --cwd apps/api-worker build && bun run --cwd apps/web build && bun run --cwd docs-site build
scripts.build-storybook: bun run version:write && bun run --cwd apps/web build-storybook
scripts.test:e2e: bun run version:write && bun run --cwd apps/web test:e2e
